import type { Metadata } from 'next'; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: 'About | John Doe Portfolio', description: 'Learn more about John Doe, my experience, frontend and backend skills.', }; export default function About() { return (

About Me

Who I am

I am a passionate Fullstack Developer with over 5 years of experience building modern web applications. I specialize in React, Next.js on the frontend and Node.js with PostgreSQL on the backend.

My journey started with creating simple scripts, which soon turned into a fascination with web technologies and building scalable, beautiful systems that people love to use. When I'm not coding, I enjoy contributing to open-source and reading about UI/UX principles.

Experience

Senior Frontend Engineer Tech Solutions Inc.

2021 - Present

Fullstack Developer Creative Web Agency

2018 - 2021

My Skills

Frontend

  • React & Next.js
  • TypeScript
  • CSS / SCSS / Tailwind
  • Vue.js

Backend

  • Node.js / Express
  • Python / Django
  • PostgreSQL
  • MongoDB

Tools

  • Git & GitHub
  • Docker
  • AWS / Vercel
  • Figma
